name: Farnova Group Holdings Limited
summary: Farnova Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides advertising, and movie production and distribution services in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through three segments: Advertising, Money Lending, and Securities Investments. It offers short-term personal and property mortgage loans, as well as invests and trades in securities. The company was formerly known as Code Agriculture (Holdings) Limited and changed its name to Farnova Group Holdings Limited in May 2020. Farnova Group Holdings Limited was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
